global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with a focus on food icons and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: QuickFork offers quick dinner options nearby.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, creating a vibrant and eye-catching base.

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'QuickFork' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Food icons
elements.description: Three stylized food icons are displayed in a row, representing different meal options, with a simple and clean design.

elements.label: Food icons
elements.description: Another food icon similar to the previous ones, maintaining a cohesive design with a minimalistic style.

elements.label: Food icon
elements.description: A single food icon that complements the others, designed with a simplistic and appealing aesthetic.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes
elements.description: The text 'Dinner in minutes' is prominently displayed in a large, bold font, conveying urgency and convenience.

elements.label: Fresh favorites nearby
elements.description: The phrase 'Fresh favorites nearby' is written in a smaller font below the main message, adding context.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Get offer' in a contrasting color, inviting users to take action.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small circular badge in the top corner with the word 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching typography.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label indicating 'UGC' in a simple font, suggesting user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by product icons in the center, and the CTA button at the bottom.
